growth_records.strain: in situ natural population (not a laboratory strain)
growth_records.medium: natural seawater, oligotrophic South Pacific Gyre core, chlorophyll a maximum (~150-200 m), Station 4

up.method: single-cell 13C-DIC incubation + nanoSIMS (highest median cell-specific rate, chl a max Station 4)

growth_records.cite: Julia Duerschlag et al. Niche partitioning by photosynthetic plankton as a driver of CO2-fixation across the oligotrophic South Pacific Subtropical Ocean. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01072-z. [PMC8776750]
growth_records.snippet: Prochlorococcus single-cell activity exhibited enhanced cell-specific rates of CO2 uptake at the edges of the SPG, with highest rates in the chl a max of Station 4 of 0.52 fmol C cell-1 d-1 ... C-based growth rates for Prochlorococcus ... (
growth_records.notes: Prochlorococcus is a prokaryote (marine picocyanobacterium). Experimental single-cell CO2 fixation rate 0.52 fmol C cell^-1 d^-1 (Station 4 chl a max, highest) measured directly by 13C-DIC uptake + nanoSIMS; kept in reported per-cell units (fmol C cell^-1 d^-1) because no cell dry weight is given to convert to mmol/gDW/h. Growth rate: reported C-based median 0.16 d^-1 at Station 4 chl a max (estimated from 13C incorporation assuming exponential growth). Converted: mu = 0.16 d^-1 / 24 = 0.0067 h^-1; doubling time = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.16 = 4.33 d = 104 h. Broader SPG Prochlorococcus growth range reported 0.06-0.8 d^-1. Temperature/pH not stated in text (oceanographic transect).

growth_records.strain: in situ natural population (not a laboratory strain)
growth_records.medium: natural seawater, oligotrophic South Pacific Gyre core, Station 8 (surface ~20 m and chl a max)

up.method: single-cell 13C-DIC incubation + nanoSIMS (median, core gyre Station 8)

growth_records.cite: Julia Duerschlag et al. Niche partitioning by photosynthetic plankton as a driver of CO2-fixation across the oligotrophic South Pacific Subtropical Ocean. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01072-z. [PMC8776750]
growth_records.snippet: In contrast median values of <0.3 fmol C cell-1 d-1 were observed in the core oligotrophic gyre waters at Station 8 ... Moreover, 20% of Prochlorococcus cells within Station 8 surface waters showed no detectable activity.
growth_records.notes: Prokaryote (Prochlorococcus). Experimental single-cell CO2 fixation median <0.3 fmol C cell^-1 d^-1 in the ultraoligotrophic core gyre (Station 8); 20% of surface cells showed no detectable 13C uptake. Reported per-cell units retained (no cell dry weight for gDW conversion). C-based Prochlorococcus growth rates across oligotrophic SPG reported as 0.06-0.8 d^-1 (span; no single value isolated for Station 8), so per-h mu left null. Temperature/pH not stated.

growth_records.strain: in situ natural population (not a laboratory strain)
growth_records.medium: natural seawater, mesotrophic Southwest Pacific (SWP), Station 12

up.method: single-cell 13C-DIC incubation + nanoSIMS (SWP, higher DIN flux)

growth_records.cite: Julia Duerschlag et al. Niche partitioning by photosynthetic plankton as a driver of CO2-fixation across the oligotrophic South Pacific Subtropical Ocean. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01072-z. [PMC8776750]
growth_records.snippet: with highest rates in the chl a max of Station 4 of 0.52 fmol C cell-1 d-1 and 0.6 fmol C cell-1 d-1 in the SWP, where DIN fluxes are expectedly greater.
growth_records.notes: Prokaryote (Prochlorococcus). Experimental single-cell CO2 fixation 0.6 fmol C cell^-1 d^-1 in the mesotrophic Southwest Pacific (Station 12), the highest per-cell Prochlorococcus fixation reported, attributed to greater DIN flux. Reported per-cell units retained (no gDW conversion possible). Growth per-h not isolated for SWP Prochlorococcus, so null. Temperature/pH not stated.
